hero.title: Build Your {empire}
hero.description: Draft Wikipedia articles, earn points from real search trends, and compete in weekly tournaments. The ultimate fantasy game for the curious mind.
hero.creditsNote: Start with 1,000 credits • No credit card required

howItWorks.title: How {brand} Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Join thousands of players competing in the ultimate knowledge-based fantasy game.

search.title: Search Articles
search.description: Explore millions of Wikipedia articles. Find trending topics, hidden gems, or your favorite subjects.

portfolio.title: Build Your Portfolio
portfolio.description: Buy articles with your 1,000 starting credits. Choose contract durations from 3 to 90 days.

points.title: Earn Points Daily
points.description: Score points based on real Wikipedia pageviews. Trending articles = more points!

compete.title: Compete & Win
compete.description: Climb the leaderboard, join weekly tournaments, and earn bonus rewards.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for the ultimate fantasy knowledge experience.

liveMarkets.title: 24/7 Live Markets
liveMarkets.description: Buy, sell, and trade articles anytime. The market never sleeps.

realTimeScoring.title: Real-Time Scoring
realTimeScoring.description: Points calculated daily from actual Wikipedia pageview data.

chemistry.title: Chemistry Bonuses
chemistry.description: Link related articles for bonus points, FIFA-style.

dynamicPricing.title: Dynamic Pricing
dynamicPricing.description: Article prices adjust based on trending topics and demand.

privateLeagues.title: Private Leagues
privateLeagues.description: Create private leagues and compete with friends.

weeklyTournaments.title: Weekly Tournaments
weeklyTournaments.description: Join automatic weekly competitions for bonus rewards.

powerTournaments.title: Power Tournaments
powerTournaments.description: Monthly elite competitions for the top performers.

fairPlay.title: Fair Play
fairPlay.description: Transparent scoring system based on public data.

leaderboardPreview.title: Compete for {glory}
leaderboardPreview.subtitle: Every week, all active players automatically enter a competitive tournament. Climb the ranks, earn bonus points, and prove your knowledge dominance.

articleLeaderboard.unavailable: Top article data unavailable right now.
articleLeaderboard.viewsUnavailable: Total views not available right now

cta.title: Ready to Build Your Knowledge Empire?
cta.description: Join thousands of players already competing in the world's first Wikipedia-based fantasy game. Start with 1,000 free credits.
cta.footer: No credit card required • Free to play • Win real rewards
